about.title: Software Developer
about.bio: Software Engineer with 15 years of experience, specialized in back-end development using technologies such as PHP, Symfony, MySQL, and Doctrine. I also have knowledge of front-end and DevOps, and I easily adapt to different environments and projects. I am passionate about continuous learning and innovation, and I strive to stay up-to-date with trends and technological advancements, as well as to inspire and evolve my team.
